venues.name: Mowgli
venues.description: Inside. Water bowl. Warm staff. A stunning Indian street food restaurant where dogs are fully inside — not near a door. One of our favourites in London.

venues.name: Bellanger
venues.description: Inside. Water bowl. Outstanding staff. Homemade dog biscuits on arrival. A Parisian brasserie that treats your dog as well as it treats you.

venues.name: Carlotta
venues.description: Inside. Water bowl on arrival. Friendly staff. An elegant Italian-American restaurant that gets it right — your dog will feel as welcome as you do.

venues.name: Los Mochis
venues.description: Inside & terrace. Water bowl. Welcoming staff. Mexican-Japanese fusion in Notting Hill. Call ahead to confirm dog access on the day.

venues.name: The Orange
venues.description: Inside. Water bowl. Good staff. An award-winning gastropub in a Victorian townhouse with a sustainable menu. Dogs genuinely welcome.
